name: Szechaun Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Extra-large raw shrimp, shelled, and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a wok or large skillet.
2. Add shrimp, green onion, and garlic. Stir fry until shrimp are pink.
3. Add sherry, soy sauce, sugar, and salt. Stir well and blend in cornstarch, chilli sauce, and red pepper flakes.
4. Serve with a bed of hot rice.
